totalEarnings.description: Total driver earnings (gross, including cash rides)

cashEarnings.description: Earnings from cash rides (physically collected by driver)

digitalEarnings.description: Earnings from digital (okrapay) rides, net of commission

subscriptionEarnings.description: Earnings from rides taken under subscription (zero commission)

totalCommissionPaid.description: Total commission deducted from this driver (float deductions)

commissionSavedBySubscription.description: Amount saved in commission by being on a subscription plan

totalFloatPurchased.description: Cumulative float top-ups by this driver

totalFloatDeducted.description: Cumulative float deducted via ride commissions

currentFloatBalance.description: Snapshot of float balance at report time

lowestFloatBalance.description: Lowest recorded float balance (can be negative)

negativeFloatCount.description: Number of times float went negative

totalWithdrawn.description: Total amount withdrawn by this driver

totalPendingWithdrawals.description: Current pending withdrawal amount at report time

floatRides.description: Rides completed under float system (commission deducted)
